channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. PlayStation Plus Monthly Games for June 2026 Includes One of the Best Warhammer 40,000 Games Around  IGN
  3. Poll: Are You Happy with Your PS Plus Essential Games for June 2026?  Push Square
  4. Destiny 2 joins PS Plus as final update arrives  MSN
  5. EA Game and 2 Other Games Free With PlayStation Plus for 24 Hours  comicbook.com

item.title: DuckDuckGo installs jumped 18% after Google killed the blue links. On Apple devices, the spike hit 70%. - The Next Web
item.description:
1. DuckDuckGo installs jumped 18% after Google killed the blue links. On Apple devices, the spike hit 70%.  The Next Web
  2. DuckDuckGo installs are up 30% as users reject being ‘force-fed’ Google’s AI Search  TechCrunch
  3. Google's AI-First Overhaul Annoys Users So Much They Are Actually Switching Search Engines  inc.com
  4. Google announcing its AI Search makeover has had an unintended effect on DuckDuckGo  PhoneArena
  5. DuckDuckGo sees iPhone installs spike in the US following AI announcements at Google I/O  9to5Mac

item.title: Marathon Is Already Going Free-To-Play After Troubled Launch - GAMINGbible
item.description:
1. Marathon Is Already Going Free-To-Play After Troubled Launch  GAMINGbible
  2. Welcome to Season 2  Bungie.net
  3. Marathon Season 2 arrives June 2  PlayStation.Blog
  4. Marathon's First Open Play Week Starts On June 2  Engadget
  5. Marathon’s second season is a chance for Bungie to turn things around  The Verge

item.title: Quiz: When Is Switch 2 Going Up In Price? - Nintendo Life
item.description:
1. Quiz: When Is Switch 2 Going Up In Price?  Nintendo Life

  4. Nintendo Switch 2 Purchase Conditions in Japan Changed on My Nintendo Store! 50-Hour Playtime Restriction Removed  Saiga NAK
